description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy, and define variables DEPLOY_FOLDER, EXE_RELEASE_FOLDER, MSBUILD_PATH, MSI_RELEASE_FOLDER, NUGET_PATH, NUNIT_PATH, TEST_FOLDER. In the build stage add a build_job that runs '& "$env:NUGET_PATH" restore' then '& "$env:MSBUILD_PATH" /p:Configuration=Release', publishes the built executable, MSI and test folder as artifacts (paths using $env variables) that expire in one week, and runs only on tag pipelines. In the test stage add a test_job that depends on build_job, runs '& "$env:NUNIT_PATH" ".\\$env:TEST_FOLDER\\Tests.dll"', stores TestResult.xml as an artifact for one week, and also runs only on tags. In the deploy stage add a deploy_job that depends on both build_job and test_job, runs only on tags, extracts the latest commit subject with git log, builds a deploy folder path using $env:DEPLOY_FOLDER, $env:CI_BUILD_TAG and the commit subject, then copies the built exe, MSI and TestResult.xml into that folder using xcopy.
